title: ExcellentGangs
description: A simple, lightweight and modern teams plugin.
body:
![](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/excellentgangs/logo.png) [![[​]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/overview/btn_discord.png)](https://discord.gg/EwNFGsnGaW) [![[​]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/overview/btn_donate.png) ](https://ko-fi.com/nightexpress)[![[​]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/overview/btn_manual.png)](https://nightexpressdev.com/excellentgangs/) ​ **ExcellentGangs** is a simple, lightweight and modern **teams plugin**. It allows players to create their own **teams**, invite other players and play together, sharing their locations, inventories, player data and more! Players can **upgrade** their teams to unlock various features, such as: name colors, increased members limit, increased team's vault slots, etc.
![[​IMG]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/badge/sysreqs.png) - **Server Software**: **[Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/link-forums/88/)** or **[Paper](https://papermc.io/downloads/paper)** - **Server Version**: **1.21.8** or above - **Java Version**: **[21](https://adoptium.net/)** or above - **Dependencies**: **[NightCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nightcore)** - **Folia Supported**: **No** - **Forge Supported**: **No** ![[​IMG1]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/badge/features.png) - **Database Support**. SQLite and MySQL options. - **GUI Driven**. Almost everything for end-users is managed through fully customizable GUIs! - **Custom Screens**. Uses custom screens for the best user experience! ![[​IMG2]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/excellentgangs/gang_menu.gif) - **Team Levels**. Create custom levels and set which features they will provide! - **Level Upgrades**. Upgrade your team at a cost to unlock cool features! - **Level Requirements**. Define custom upgrade requirements for each level! ![[​IMG3]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/excellentgangs/gang_levels.gif) - **Team Name**. Create team with any name you wish and rename it at any time! - **Team Prefix**. Set custom prefix for internal team messages! - **Team Bank**. Share your funds with the team and use it for team upgrades! - **Currency Restrictions**. Restrict which currencies can be stored in team’s banks! - **Access Permissions**. Restrict bank view and usage access to certain ranks only! ![[​IMG4]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/excellentgangs/gang_bank.gif) - **Team Vault**. Share your items with the team and unlock more slots with level upgrades! - **Slot Limits**. Unlock more vault slots by upgreading team’s level! - **Access Permissions**. Restrict vault view and usage access to certain ranks only! ![[​IMG5]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/excellentgangs/gang_vault.gif) - **Team Ranks**. Create custom ranks for players to use and define their permissions! - **Team Invites**. Send invites to players so they can join your team! - **Team Members**. Manage and interact with your team’s members easily! - **Promotions**. Promote and demote your team members at any time! - **Teleports**. Teleport to any online team member at any time! - **Inventories**. View inventory of any online team member at any time! ![[​IMG6]](https://nightexpressdev.com/img/excellentgangs/gang_member.gif) - **Team Chat**. Chat with your team members exclusively, so no other players can hear you! - **Team PvP**. Toggle friendly fire inside your team!
